name: agenthook
description: Character-consistent UGC video for AI agents. Create one AI influencer, reuse that same face in every video, image, and caption.

plugins.name: agenthook
plugins.description: Make character-consistent UGC video from your agent. Create a reusable AI influencer once, then ask for that same face by name in every make_video and make_image run. Bundles the AgentHook skill and the MCP server.
